missions.name: Business Growth
missions.desc: Grow RAM in a repeatable, system-led way.

missions.name: Succession & Knowledge
missions.desc: Make the business less dependent on individuals by capturing knowledge, processes and decision rules.

missions.name: Systems & Automation
missions.desc: Remove manual work and increase visibility through AI, automation and better systems.

missions.name: Operations & Projects
missions.desc: Improve project delivery, documentation, quality and execution.

missions.name: Finance & Reporting
missions.desc: Understand performance, margins, targets and reporting.

missions.name: Personal Development
missions.desc: Develop Charlotte's skills, leadership and learning.

missions.name: Home & Life
missions.desc: Keep personal life admin organised without mixing it into RAM strategy.

projects.name: Project Management - Zeeco Trial
projects.objective: Pete to take ownership of the Zeeco trial with full visibility and structured comms.
projects.notes: Pete to run this. Ensure full visibility without micromanaging. Supplier audit and expectations meeting required ahead of PO.
projects.decisions: Pete must be in all discussions. Involve DK and the office team at the right stage.

projects.name: Appraisals
projects.objective: Run a structured appraisal process across the team.

projects.name: AI Course - Tools
projects.objective: Complete AI tools course and apply learnings to RAM.

projects.name: Live Dispatch Board / Spreadsheet
projects.objective: Build a live dispatch tracking tool that makes order status blindingly obvious.
projects.notes: Set up something that will do for now — don't wait for perfect. Must make it obvious what's in New Orders vs Confirmed. Strip back the UI.

projects.name: AI Project - Responsible Use Sections
projects.objective: Complete the responsible use and data privacy sections of the AI implementation plan.

projects.name: Future Pipeline & Sales Output
projects.objective: Create visibility of the sales pipeline, forecast and resource utilisation.
projects.notes: What info do we want? Projects coming up, likelihood to close, team resource maximisation. How to centre a quarterly meeting around this?

projects.name: Sales Team - Misalignment & Opportunities
projects.objective: Address structural misalignment in the sales team and unlock underperforming capacity.
projects.notes: Senior people taking complex enquiries = bottleneck + trapped knowledge. Jordan: potential hybrid role as strategic bridge (NCR log, closing loop with data). DK: could step into engineering manager mindset. Reps: 750k behind — urgent. Pete's time is 20% PM — needs to find customers.
projects.decisions: Cannot manage all of this and do execution + day-to-day. Other people need to be involved.

projects.name: Leadership Coaching - Leon
projects.objective: Coach Leon toward genuine leadership behaviours, not just administration.
projects.notes: Leon's mindset: independent, doesn't share info with team, resistant to change. Goal: get him tackling recurring warehouse errors proactively and owning team effectiveness.
projects.decisions: Frequent light-touch contact likely more effective than big set-pieces.

projects.name: Company Structure - Future Mapping & Skills Gaps
projects.objective: Map the future company structure and identify where skills gaps exist.
projects.notes: Want to get this done right — chip away at it, invite different people at different stages. Speak to Walt (conovalve) about succession plan.

projects.name: Sales - AEO & Pipeline Generation
projects.objective: Generate more of the right enquiries by redirecting organic demand from competitors and solving customer problems.
projects.notes: They Ask You Answer framework. Uber Suggest, Cyt. Buying process triggers. Only need 40-50 articles total. Merged with Target Accounts.
projects.decisions: Set up meeting with Alex to align — he has been working on this already.

projects.name: Sales - Pipeline & Meetings
projects.objective: Make sales meetings productive and pipeline management a genuine habit.
projects.notes: Pipeline not respected, no consideration of targets. Sock meeting issues: lateness, bad attitude, no workload management. Meeting etiquette generally poor. Daily stand-up worth considering.
projects.decisions: Find a way to do a meeting review or establish what people want from the meetings.

projects.name: Sales - Target Accounts
projects.objective: Coach the sales team to proactively target and win specific accounts.
projects.notes: Nuclear — don't sleep on this. Weekly 30-min meeting with Robert: 15 min project review, 15 min sales generation. Target dormant customers and specific industries. Proactivity is key.

projects.name: Charlotte Development
projects.objective: Build Charlotte's leadership skills — especially holding people accountable without it feeling like nagging.

projects.name: Buyers Journey
projects.objective: Map where RAM consistently lets customers down and build a better communication process.
projects.notes: Where do we let customers down? Customer consistency. Communication for its own sake. Could start with DK — what would give you confidence to start moving things along?

projects.name: Process Review - Finding Inefficiencies
projects.objective: Systematically identify and document process inefficiencies across the business.

projects.name: Notebook LM - RAM Brain
projects.objective: Build a knowledge base (RAM Brain) that captures pricing, part numbers, tricky applications and HR/quality info.
projects.notes: Brain / book / buddy / boss model. Try uploading part numbers + descriptions + kits to NotebookLM. Include pricing where possible. Zip HR/quality docs. Tell brain what Claude has prices for.
projects.decisions: Requires structured interviews with DK, RLJ and RIK to capture senior knowledge. RAM_Brain_Rules_and_Assumptions.txt not yet created — outstanding.

projects.name: ARP - Define Roles & Priorities
projects.objective: Define clear priorities and role expectations for the sales and account management team.
projects.notes: Get top 5 priorities for sales team and get buy-in from each person. DK and Robert — where are they strongest? Pete: what problem does RAM now have that needs solving? Define what Pete's role looks like strategically. Sales target: £800k. Proactivity, face-to-face with customers, maximise active accounts.
projects.decisions: Pete's dual role: project management + targeted new business. Need a discussion to nail down exactly what we want him to do. Mark could come into office to start this process.

projects.name: Taxi for Andy's Wedding
projects.objective: Book taxis for the wedding.
projects.notes: Enroute Taxis (6+4): £160 out / £207 return. Swift Valley Coaches: £455 total. Kirks Mini Taxis: £460 total. Arrow Cars East Midlands (8+4): £266 out / approx £300 return.

projects.name: Automations
projects.objective: Identify and build automations to remove manual repetitive work.

projects.name: Marketing & Positioning
projects.objective: Define and improve how RAM positions itself in the market.

projects.name: Sales KPIs & Margin Review
projects.objective: Build visibility of sales KPIs and margin by product/customer.

projects.name: Forecasting & Management Accounts
projects.objective: Improve forecasting process and management accounts reporting.
